author: cms-L1TK
body:
This PR must be coupled with cms-sw PR #33837 (update of L1 tracking algorithm) and should be merged and go in to the same release. 

- Removes files that become unused with code updates in PR #33837
- Updated configuration files for the extended (displaced) tracking to work with new InputRouter module

=> Please only merge when PR #33837 (https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/33837) gets included!
title: Update data-files (match cms-sw PR #33837)
